description: Retheme PixelOfficeConstants, PixelCharacter (add waitingForWork state), and PixelOfficeViewModel to support the House of Kiroween theme and ACP idle detection.
steps: Step 1 - Update PixelOfficeConstants.swift: Replace characterPalettes with ghost-themed palettes.
Step 2 - Update PixelCharacter.swift: Add waitingForWork case and from(taskStatus:agentStatus:) method.
Step 3 - Update PixelOfficeViewModel.swift: Add updateCharacters(from:agentStatuses:) in both platform blocks.
Step 4 - Update PixelOfficeTests.swift: Add 8 new tests for waitingForWork state.
acceptance_criteria: swift test passes 258 tests with 0 failures
findings: 258 tests, 0 failures. All changes applied to both platform blocks.
